title: DiscoverSG - Infocomm System Project
description:
Developed as a cross-disciplinary collaboration between the School of Engineering and the School of Business Management for the module Infocomm System Project, DiscoverSG is an AI-powered travel ecosystem tailored for the digital-native generation. 
 Recognizing that Gen Z travelers often face information overload and fragmented planning tools, we engineered a centralized hub that consolidates the entire journey. Working in a team of five, we applied Scrum practices to guide our development process, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, iterative builds, and regular reviews to improve the product continuously. Through this structured approach, I contributed to designing and developing a streamlined planning hub that integrates research, real-time routing, and group coordination into a single responsive web experience.

title: ChopeSeats
description: Designed an online restaurant reservation application using PHP, HTML, CSS, mySQL & JavaScript/jQuery. Upon sketching the wireframes and sitemap on Adobe Illustrator, the website was built from the ground up. The website is also responsive to accommodate for mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts. The website allows user to create free accounts and login to reserve different restaurants. After booking, users then can choose to delete the reservation if it is within 2 days of the booking date. Users also can update their email and phone number. The website also features a search bar that allows users to search for the restaurants available for booking.

title: CleanerAirSG - Air Quality Application
description: Developed this mobile app to provide personalised, location-based air quality insights that help Singaporeans make informed decisions about their daily activities. CleanerAir SG integrates real-time PSI, PM2.5, temperature, and humidity data from Data.gov.sg APIs and presents it through a clear, mobile-friendly interface with visual charts and health indicators. Users can save favourite neighbourhoods, customise alert preferences, and receive notifications when air quality exceeds safe thresholds, with tailored recommendations for sensitive groups. Built using Firebase Authentication, Firestore, and Provider for state management, the app transforms public environmental data into actionable insights, supporting Singapore’s Smart Nation vision while promoting greater environmental awareness and healthier lifestyle choices.
